content:
hey,
I was wondering if we plan to allow zkboost latch opto proving networks like SP1 network, boundless or more?

author: han0110
content: So far we only have SP1 `ere-server` supports network prover, you can try `ere-server --elf-path <elf-path> network --endpoint <endpoint> --api-key <api-key>`, but I never tested that before because I don't have an api key 😅
